<!-- GENERATED by cmd/gendocs from internal/checks/registry.go. Do not edit by hand; run `make docs-gen`. -->

## Rule ID

`kind: filesystem_filename_prefix`

## Purpose

Require that the filename starts with a specific prefix.

## Configuration keys

| Field | Required | Default | Meaning |
|---|---|---|---|
| `value` | yes | — | Required filename prefix. |

## Example

```yaml
collections:
  notes:
    path: notes
    checks:
      - kind: filesystem_filename_prefix
        value: book-
```
